payload.answer: SQL debug/admin access is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The query was not executed.

entity_resolution.reason: No user memory should be created or updated from an admin SQL/debug command.

details: Rejected /brain admin sql request because SQL execution is disabled.
No memory cards were created, modified, or deleted.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED only in an authorized debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.
Use supported non-SQL admin/debug inspection commands if available.
